posts.author: Kunal (Kunal)
posts.cookedHtml:
My authorization request is as below

auth.monday.com

Welcome to monday.com | a new way of working

monday.com Work OS is an open platform where anyone can create the tools they need to run every aspect of their work.

and i have set my redirect uri to

https://fc7f6898f266.ngrok.io/monday/test

on monday platform (i have only one redirect uri set for my app)

My problem is when I run the authorization request from the postman it shows me an error

{
    "error": "invalid_request",

    "error_description": "Invalid redirect_uri"
}

Please help me out on this.

posts.author: Helen (Helen)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @Kunal,

Apologies for the delay here! I believe you may have posted in the wrong section. For all questions relating to our monday apps framework and our API, you can post it to the “monday Apps & Developers” section. This is where our Developer Success team will be monitoring new posts.

Are you still experiencing an issue with your request? In general, you can find more specific errors relating to your OAuth tunnel in the URL.

Let me know! Happy to continue digging into this with you.

posts.author: Helen (Helen)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @Kunal,

Since we haven’t heard back from you, I’m going to mark my last response as the solution.

If the issue is still persisting for you, please feel free to comment on this thread within the next week, or just start a new thread.

Thanks!

posts.author: system (system)
posts.cookedHtml: This topic was automatically closed 7 days after the last reply. New replies are no longer allowed.
